args_redacted.content:
Top 5 Open Source LLM Frameworks in 2026:

1. LangChain - Python orchestration framework for building applications with LLMs
2. LlamaIndex - Data indexing and retrieval framework for LLM applications
3. Haystack - End-to-end NLP framework for building search and question answering systems
4. AutoGen - Multi-agent conversation framework for building LLM-powered applications
5. CrewAI - Role-based multi-agent framework for orchestrating AI agents

Top 5 Open Source LLM Frameworks in 2026:

1. LangChain - Python orchestration framework for building applications with LLMs
2. LlamaIndex - Data indexing and retrieval framework for LLM applications
3. Haystack - End-to-end NLP framework for building search and question answering systems
4. AutoGen - Multi-agent conversation framework for building LLM-powered applications
5. CrewAI - Role-based multi-agent framework for orchestrating AI agents
